Hey! How are you doing? 👋

10:30 AM

I'm great, thanks! Working on a new CSS project. How about you?

10:32 AM ✓✓
JD

Nice! What kind of project? Anything with those new CSS features you mentioned?

10:33 AM

Yes! Refactoring demos with @layer, @container, :has(), color-mix(), and subgrid. It's amazing how much cleaner the code is! 🎨

10:35 AM ✓✓
JD

That sounds awesome! Can you show me some examples? Especially curious about :has() - I've heard it's a game changer!

10:36 AM

Absolutely! In this chat, I'm using :has() to style message bubbles when they're selected. No JavaScript needed for the visual state! Check the CSS 😉

10:38 AM ✓✓
JD

🤯 Mind blown! CSS is getting so powerful. What about container queries?

10:39 AM
